calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Petition to terminate estate is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Nov-08-2023 Continued To Nov-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court clerk called Mr. Cowan's office and spoke to Mario Calderon (assistant) and requested to have Mr. Cowen make an appearance on the November 20, 2023 Probate calendar. Petition for termination etc., is continued to November 20, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Cabrera: Not reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)

Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Continued To Aug-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Continued To Aug-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Cowan appearing via zoom for Lawrence Richard Jr. (petitioner).

Mr. Cowan stated that he had no luck contacting the administrator, that a watch was the only thing a family member had possession of from the decedent, that there is no assets to move forward and the probate should be terminated. Status of hearing on close of estate is continued to August 07, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Continued To Jun-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mr. Cowan apologized to the court stating that he didn't know about the hearing until he got the notes from the examiner, that once they filed, he lost contact with the administrator, that the administrator has a history of traveling around the Country, and that he has no idea where the administrator is. Mr. Cowan also stated that he has no way to contact the administrator, that he did not get far enough to know how much is in the bank accounts that may or may not exist, that there was some of the decedent's clothing, that he suspects there is nothing, but he is not sure, that he would like to give it one more push and requested a 90-day continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to June 5, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court expects that Mr. Cowan has done some due diligence and that he reports back. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Lawrence Richard, Jr. and his attorney Robert Cowan to appear on February 27, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed, and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
